title: Christmas Eve Santa Treats Tray – Kids Santa Plate for Mince Pie, Carrot & Drink – Reusable Melamine Xmas Eve Plate for Father Christmas & Rudolph Snacks – 29.5 x 16.5cm Durable Festive Tableware
features: MAGICAL CHRISTMAS EVE TRADITION: Give children the joy of leaving out Santa’s mince pie, drink, and Rudolph’s carrot with this festive Santa treat tray, designed to make Christmas Eve extra special.
CLEARLY MARKED SECTIONS: Fun illustrated outlines show exactly where to place a mince pie, drink, and carrot, helping kids set out treats in the right spots for Father Christmas and his reindeer.
DURABLE & REUSABLE MELAMINE: Made from strong, lightweight melamine that’s dishwasher safe, this Christmas Eve plate is built to last year after year as part of your festive family traditions.
PERFECT SIZE FOR TREATS: Measuring 29.5 cm x 16.5 cm, the tray provides plenty of space for Santa’s snack and Rudolph’s carrot while remaining compact enough to fit on any table or mantle.
BRIGHT FESTIVE DESIGN FOR KIDS: Featuring colourful Santa and reindeer artwork, this tray brings fun and excitement to Christmas Eve, making it an ideal seasonal accessory for families with children.
description: Make Christmas Eve magical with a Santa and Rudolph treat tray that children will love. Leaving out a mince pie, a glass of milk, and a carrot has long been a cherished Christmas Eve tradition. This festive tray is specially designed to add fun and excitement to the moment, with clear sections showing where to place each treat – ensuring Father Christmas and Rudolph never go hungry on their big night! Durable and reusable , the tray is made from tough melamine, making it lightweight yet strong enough to be used year after year. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, it’s a practical alternative to disposable plates and a great way to reduce Christmas waste while keeping the magic alive. At 29.5 cm x 16.5 cm , it’s perfectly sized to hold Santa’s mince pie and drink along with Rudolph’s carrot, without taking up too much space on your table, mantle, or windowsill. The bright, bold festive design featuring Santa and his reindeer makes it especially appealing for children and creates a fun seasonal tradition for the whole family. Why you’ll love it: Adds excitement to Christmas Eve for kids and families Reusable melamine construction – durable and eco-friendly Fun illustrated layout showing where to place treats Compact size with plenty of room for snacks Festive Santa and Rudolph artwork in bold colours Bring the magic of Christmas Eve to life with this charming Santa treat tray – a must-have festive accessory that children will look forward to using year after year.
